ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subcategory the article belongs to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the article (e.g., Technical, Access, Network) */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "article_body" TEXT /* Body of the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the article (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was published */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the article */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score for the article (e.g., likes, comments, shares) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "parent_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent subcategory (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategories_parent_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., writer, editor, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article version */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the article */,
  "article_body" TEXT /* Body of the article for this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when this version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when this version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article this collaborator is working on */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author collaborating on the article */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., writer, editor, reviewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaborator was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_collaborators_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_collaborators_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article this comment belongs to */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who made the comment */,
  "comment_body" TEXT /* Body of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article this like belongs to */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who liked the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the like was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_likes_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_likes_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article this tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_tags_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
